root.name: Add subtitle 'Port Numbers and Process Identification' to Slide 7
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent correctly added the subtitle below the main title on slide 7 as specified.

children.name: Subtitle Text Correctness
children.description: Checks if the new subtitle text 'Port Numbers and Process Identification' is present on slide 7.
children.reason: Subtitle 'Port Numbers and Process Identification' not found on slide 7.

children.name: Subtitle Placement
children.description: Checks that the subtitle is visually below the main title on slide 7 (not overlapping or above).

children.name: No Unwanted Changes
children.description: Checks that there are no extraneous changes to slide 7 except the intended subtitle addition.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Checks that there are no extraneous changes other slides.

root.reason: The criterion received a failing score because the agent completely failed to add the required subtitle to slide 7. Both critical requirements were not met: the subtitle text "Port Numbers and Process Identification" was not found anywhere on the slide, and consequently there was no subtitle shape to evaluate for proper placement below the main title. While the agent avoided making unwanted changes to the presentation, the core task of adding the specified subtitle was not accomplished at all.

metadata.task: Slide 7: Add a subtitle 'Port Numbers and Process Identification' below the main title
